title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 7 July 2026.

items.title: A **World Of Warcraft** Plague Killed Players And Filled Inns With Nasty Contagious Goo
bullets: The event has been dubbed "Corrupted Blood Incident 2.0"
The glitch that caused the event was hotfixed on July 3rd

items.title: **EVE Online**'s cross-platform game engine framework is now fully open source
**Nintendo** of Europe will stop selling the Nintendo Switch fom "mid-February 2027"
bullets: Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite and Nintendo Switch OLED models are affected
Whilst not explictly stated, it is expected this only affects European customers at this time

items.title: <ICYMI> Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees, and more than 30 percent of the job losses are in the company’s **Xbox** division
bullets: The layoffs, which are being described as an Xbox “reset” moment, will impact around 1,600 Xbox employees, according to an internal memo from Xbox CEO Asha Sharma

bullets.text: Microsoft is planning to eliminate a total of around 20 percent of Xbox jobs by the end of the financial year in July 2027

bullets: Double Fine and Compulsion Games are going independent, and Microsoft is also selling Ninja Theory and Undead Labs

bullets.text: Double Fine and Compulsion Games have been allowed to become independant along with "their IP, catalog and runway for this next games"

bullets: Microsoft is also weighing up selling or closing another Xbox studio; Arkane Studio. “In France, Arkane’s management is beginning required consultation with its Works Council to review potential strategic options,” says Sharma

bullets.text: Other Xbox studios will also be impacted by layoffs across the board with particular focus on Zenimax / Bethesda studios

items.title: **Xbox** wanted 77M Game Pass subscribers by 2026. Today, it has less than half that (30 million)
Ingress developer **Niantic Spatial** shuttering New Zealand office
